intro: ChatGPT's market share fell below 50% for the first time as Google Gemini gains ground in the competitive AI assistant space. Google is launching a new Home Speaker on June 25 with Gemini integration, though most advanced features will require a premium subscription. Meanwhile, China's top diplomat called for a global AI cooperation organization as the G7 discussed restricting American model access to trusted partners, signaling diverging visions for AI governance.

whitelist.title: ChatGPT market share falls below 50% for first time
whitelist.desc: Gemini is coming after ChatGPT's market share

whitelist.title: The new Google Home Speaker will finally replace the Next Audio after six years — but most of its clever Gemini-powered tools are locked behind the Google Home Premium wall
whitelist.desc: The June 25 rumors were true

whitelist.title: Everpure accelerates AI workloads with Data Stream and unveils data-primacy architectural vision
whitelist.desc: Big-data storage company Everpure Inc., formerly known as Pure Storage, is rethinking enterprise data architectures to facilitate better access and scalability for artificial intelligence workloads.

whitelist.desc: China's top diplomat called for a global AI cooperation org as the G7 discussed "trusted partner" access to US models. Two visions for AI governance are diverging.

whitelist.desc: Chi-Hua Chien has spent more than two decades as a venture capitalist, but he thinks like a cultural anthropologist.

whitelist.title: Get ready for Disney's big AI ads push
whitelist.desc: Disney is launching AI-generated TV ads in July. A new tool generates scripts, music, and video to streamline ad creation.

whitelist.title: OpenAI is sunsetting Pulse, which showed you custom daily digests in ChatGPT.
whitelist.desc: Alongside the announcement of an updated experience for scheduling tasks, OpenAI said that Pulse would be going away “in the next 14 days” and suggested using scheduled tasks for a daily briefing instead. Pulse was short-lived: the company launched it in September. [Media: https://twitter.com/ChatGPTapp/status/2067316962225684888]

whitelist.title: Claude Design’s new editor, export options, and Claude Code links bring it closer to competing with Figma and Canva.
whitelist.desc: The AI design chatbot’s new editor has controls for directly dragging, resizing, and aligning elements, and more options for apps you can export to, including Adobe and Canva. Users can also work on design projects directly from the Claude Code terminal, or hand off software layouts from Design directly to Claude Code, where it picks up exactly where you left off, without a screenshot or a rebuild from scratch. whitelist.title: Anthropic and Google DeepMind called for a US-led AI coalition at the G7, and Canada said yes
whitelist.desc: Dario Amodei and Demis Hassabis proposed a US-led alliance to set AI rules at a closed-door G7 lunch with Trump and world leaders. No binding outcomes emerged.
